languages.text: "Себериан лично поручил мне охранять его клинок. Покиньте пост".

traits.locale_text: "Себериан лично поручил мне охранять его клинок. Покиньте пост".

languages.text: "Seberian has personally assigned me to guard his blade. You are relieved of your post."

languages.text: “塞贝里安亲自指派我来守卫他的剑。接下来就交给我吧。”
languages.original_text: "Seberian has personally assigned me to guard his blade. You are relieved of your post."

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安亲自指派我来守卫他的剑。接下来就交给我吧。”

languages.text: « Seberian m'a personnellement confié la garde de son épée. Vous pouvez quitter votre poste. »
languages.original_text: "Seberian has personally assigned me to guard his blade. You are relieved of your post."

traits.locale_text: « Seberian m'a personnellement confié la garde de son épée. Vous pouvez quitter votre poste. »

languages.text: "Seberian, kılıcını korumam için bizzat beni görevlendirdi. Vazifenden alındın."
languages.original_text: "Seberian has personally assigned me to guard his blade. You are relieved of your post."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian, kılıcını korumam için bizzat beni görevlendirdi. Vazifenden alındın."

languages.text: «Seberian me ha asignado personalmente a proteger su espada. Queda relevado de su puesto».
languages.original_text: "Seberian has personally assigned me to guard his blade. You are relieved of your post."

traits.locale_text: «Seberian me ha asignado personalmente a proteger su espada. Queda relevado de su puesto».

languages.text: "Seberian hat mich persönlich mit der Bewachung seiner Klinge betraut. Ihr seid von Eurem Posten entbunden."
languages.original_text: "Seberian has personally assigned me to guard his blade. You are relieved of your post."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian hat mich persönlich mit der Bewachung seiner Klinge betraut. Ihr seid von Eurem Posten entbunden."

languages.text: 「シベリアは私を自分の刀を守るために指名した。君はその任務から解放される。」
languages.original_text: "Seberian has personally assigned me to guard his blade. You are relieved of your post."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアは私を自分の刀を守るために指名した。君はその任務から解放される。」
